signals.headline: # XRP SEC Lawsuit Resolution Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
# XRP SEC Lawsuit Resolution Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence

The **SEC has officially dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, removing a regulatory overhang that had weighed on XRP for approximately five years[1]. This resolution fundamentally shifts market dynamics and has directly catalyzed XRP's April surge.

## Key Confirmations Moving Prediction Markets

signals.raw: XRP surged 10% in early April, breaking above the $1.50 resistance level and currently consolidating around $1.42[1]

signals.raw: Support has established firmly above $1.30, with next resistance between $1.60-$1.75[1]
